summary: Most requested marketing-site sections and CTAs are implemented as in-page anchored sections with responsive header navigation, themed styling, WhatsApp floating button, contact form wired to a Motoko backend, and generated-image backgrounds referenced. However, the backend inquiry listing order does not meet the specified ordering, the requested generated service-icons sprite is not evidenced as being used, and several unrequested access-control/user-profile/admin-token features appear to be added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend list inquiries method must return inquiries with a clear order (most recent first or otherwise explicitly ordered).
missing_requirements.reason: The backend appends new messages to the end of the array and returns it directly, which yields oldest-first order with no explicit sorting/reversal.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use the generated 5-icon monochrome line icon sprite (buy, sell, rent, property management, construction) in the UI.
missing_requirements.reason: The UI uses Lucide React icons for services and other UI elements; no evidence in the diff summary that the provided sprite asset is rendered anywhere.

missing_requirements.requirement: Footer contains quick links to the main sections (Home, About Us, Services, Properties, Construction, Why Choose Us, Testimonials, Contact Us).
missing_requirements.reason: The footer navSections shown include Home/About/Services/Properties and a Services group; the diff snippet does not show links for Why Choose Us, Testimonials, or Contact Us (may be absent).

hallucinated_features.description: Added access-control/authorization system with admin/user permissions and initialization via secret token parameter.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest is a marketing site with no auth/admin dashboard requirement and explicitly notes Internet Identity is not required; REQ-13 only asks for minimal persistence + create/list inquiry methods.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile storage and profile management endpoints (get/save user profile).
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirements mention user profiles or profile CRUD.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin-only restriction on listing contact messages.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-13 requests a method to list inquiries for future admin use but does not require authorization gating; this is additional unrequested behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: Social media links/icons (Facebook/Instagram/LinkedIn) in the footer.
hallucinated_features.reason: Footer requirements only specify company name, quick links, and provided contact details.
